ideation: This animation sequence will portray a hippopotamus's characteristic slow, deliberate movements. The hippo will have its arms slightly raised and slightly forward in a welcoming gesture, reflecting its generally calm demeanor, but with some subtle movement to suggest a gentle swaying or rocking motion.  The animation will use a 4-frame sequence to capture this movement effectively.  Both arms will mirror each other's movements. Frame 1 will be the starting position, with both arms slightly raised and forward. Frame 2 will show a subtle shift, with the arms moving slightly outward. Frame 3 will mirror Frame 2, but with the arms moving slightly inward. Finally, Frame 4 will return to the original position of Frame 1, completing the gentle swaying motion. This creates a sense of calm and relaxed movement, characteristic of a hippopotamus.

frames.beat: arms held forward, a gentle hippo greeting
arms sway slightly outward, a slow rocking
arms sway back inward, a calm sway
arms return to the gentle hippo greeting
